nasb.text: The next day as we were being violently storm-tossed, they began to jettison the cargo;

esv.text: Since we were violently storm-tossed, they began the next day to jettison the cargo.

cnv.text: 風浪把我們顛簸得很厲害，第二天他們就把貨物拋在海裡，

ccb.text: 第二天，风浪依然猛烈，他们开始把货物抛进海里。

csbs.text: 我们被暴风猛烈地袭击。第二天，他们开始把货物抛在海里。
